description: Latest HbA1c (%) auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only headline metric for list/sort; full lab history lives in the Lab child table.
label: Latest HbA1c
name: CRM Lead-custom_latest_hba1c

description: The telephony tenant that placed/received this call (set on outbound by routing, on inbound by DID match). Used to pick the right token for recording fetch.
label: Telephony Account
name: CRM Call Log-custom_telephony_account

description: Messaging provider that delivers this account's WhatsApp traffic.
label: Provider
name: WhatsApp Account-custom_provider

description: WABA number for this tenant (digits) — shown as the outbound 'From' number. Inbound is attributed by the per-account webhook token, not this field.
label: WATI Channel Number
name: WhatsApp Account-custom_wati_channel_number

description: Per-tenant inbound webhook secret. Appears in this account's webhook URL (/webhooks/whatsapp/wati/<token>) and both authenticates the caller and identifies the receiving account (WATI inbound carries no reliable tenant id). Use a unique random value per tenant; blank = inbound disabled.
label: Webhook Token (WATI)
name: WhatsApp Account-custom_webhook_token

description: Optional SSRF allowlist for inbound media fetches — pick the host(s) this account's WATI media URLs live on (from CRM Trusted Fetch Host). If set, media is fetched ONLY from these hosts or their sub-domains. Blank = any public host (fetches to private/internal IPs are always blocked).
label: Media Host Allowlist (SSRF)
name: WhatsApp Account-custom_media_host_allowlist

description: This agent's Acefone agent/follow-me number (digits). Used to map inbound calls to the Frappe user and as the bridge leg for click-to-call.
label: Acefone Number
name: CRM Telephony Agent-acefone_number

description: Same mobile number is also a lead in these product lines / programs (agent awareness). Computed live.
label: Other Programs (same patient)
name: CRM Lead-custom_patient_other_programs
options: ("; ".join(sorted({(r.custom_vertical or "?") + " / " + (r.custom_current_program or "?") for r in frappe.get_all("CRM Lead", filters={"mobile_no": doc.mobile_no, "name": ["!=", doc.name or ""]}, fields=["custom_vertical","custom_current_program"], ignore_permissions=True)}))) if doc.mobile_no else ""

description: Main lifecycle stage for this lead (per program). Options are the CRM Lead Stage rows for the lead's program with no substage_of. The native CRM Lead Status pill is hidden; stage/substage carry the real lifecycle.
label: Stage
name: CRM Lead-custom_stage

description: Main lifecycle stage for this lead (per program). Options are the CRM Lead Stage rows for the lead's program with no substage_of. The native CRM Lead Status pill is hidden; stage/substage carry the real lifecycle.
label: Main Stage
name: CRM Lead-custom_main_stage

description: Height in feet auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only; feeds the virtual BMI.
label: Height (ft)
name: CRM Lead-custom_height_feet

description: Body Mass Index, computed (not stored) from the synced Height (ft) and Weight (kg). feet -> metres = ft * 0.3048; BMI = kg / m^2. Blank until both are present.
label: BMI
name: CRM Lead-custom_bmi
options: frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_weight_kg) / (frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_height_feet) * 0.3048 * frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_height_feet) * 0.3048) if (frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_height_feet) and frappe.utils.flt(doc.custom_weight_kg)) else None

description: Date of the most recent CRM Lab Profile row, auto-synced. Read-only headline metric for sorting by report recency.
label: Last Report Date
name: CRM Lead-custom_last_report_date

description: Age in completed years, computed (not stored) from custom_dob. Blank if no DOB.
label: Age
name: CRM Lead-custom_age

description: Weight in kg auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only; feeds the virtual BMI.
label: Weight (kg)
name: CRM Lead-custom_weight_kg

description: Latest fasting blood sugar (mg/dL) auto-synced from the most recent CRM Lab Profile row. Read-only headline metric.
label: Latest FBS
name: CRM Lead-custom_latest_fbs

description: Tick if this program uses the Drug Program (chemo-cycle) profile. Drives the lead Data-tab section gate. Config, not code — a new oncology program just ticks this.
label: Is Drug Program
name: CRM Program-custom_is_drug_program

description: Set when this file's bytes live in Azure Blob, not on local disk.
label: Uploaded to Azure
name: File-custom_uploaded_to_azure

description: WATI internal message id of the WhatsApp media this file came from. The join key Refresh uses to re-link a file without duplicating it.
label: WhatsApp Message ID
name: File-custom_wa_message_id

description: WATI/Meta delivery failure reason, captured on refresh (e.g. quality restriction, OAuthException).
label: Failed Reason
name: WhatsApp Message-custom_failed_reason

description: provider message id (the provider's internal `id`). The ONE identity present on every provider path — live webhook AND getMessages history — so ingest + backfill de-duplicate on it (the webhook's whatsappMessageId is absent from history). Stamped on every ingested/backfilled row; never set on rows we originate.
label: Provider Message ID
name: WhatsApp Message-custom_provider_message_id

description: Engine-written JSON of the activity form values not mapped to a first-class column. Read-only — activity.api.save_activity is the only writer.
label: Activity Payload
name: CRM Task-custom_activity_payload

description: Unified read-only Activity & Location view (clinic anchor card + visit log with Google static-map thumbnails), rendered by the crm_lead_activity_location Client Script from location.api.lead_location_view.
label: Activity & Location
name: CRM Lead-custom_activity_timeline_html

description: Doctor-clinic anchor latitude, set on the first in-person capture. Engine-written.
label: Clinic Latitude
name: CRM Lead-custom_clinic_latitude

description: Doctor-clinic anchor longitude, set on the first in-person capture. Engine-written.
label: Clinic Longitude
name: CRM Lead-custom_clinic_longitude

description: Read-only Leaflet map of the clinic anchor (native Geolocation, no API key).
label: Clinic Location
name: CRM Lead-custom_clinic_geo

description: How the clinic anchor was set: doctor address (geocoded), first GPS capture, or a manager re-anchor. Engine-written.
label: Clinic Anchor Source
name: CRM Lead-custom_clinic_source
options:
Doctor Address
First GPS Capture
Manager Re-anchor

description: The clinic geofence anchor address. Set ONLY via the 'Set Clinic Location' search (which resolves lat/long); read-only here so free text can't desync from the coordinates.
label: Clinic Address (geofence anchor)
name: CRM Lead-custom_clinic_address

description: Read-only Leaflet map of the captured visit location (native Geolocation, no API key).
label: Location Map
name: CRM Task-custom_location_geo

description: Field-sales: the activity type auto-raised as the first open task when a lead on this program is assigned (gated by the 'followup' switch in CRM Tatva Automation). Blank = nothing auto-raised.
label: First Activity Type
name: CRM Program-custom_first_activity_type
